questionText: Provide details of your organization's financed emissions in the reporting year and in the base year.
questionKo: 귀사의 financed emissions in the 보고연도 및 in the 기준연도.에 대한 세부 정보를 입력하십시오.
simpleHelp:
GHG emissions accounting is one of the primary metrics organizations in the financial sector can use to understand how their portfolio impacts the climate. In addition to highlighting risks and opportunities, portfolio emissions disclosure is a pre-requisite for financial institutions to measure improvements in the climate performance of their portfolios, and measure progress towards the net zero commitments that are increasingly being made. 
IMPORTANT NOTE: 
This question asks you to disclose your financed emissions (also known as Scope 3 Category 15 "Investments" total absolute emissions). For organizations in the financial sector, Scope 3 Category 15 "Investments" total absolute emissions has been pulled out of question 7.8 as the majority of emissions occur in the investment chain, in relation to financial products and services and/or investments. Portfolio emissions (or Scope 3 Category 15 "Investments" total absolute emissions as defined by the GHG Protocol) is the most relevant category to financial services organizations. 
In this question, organizations in the financial sector are only requested to disclose their Scope 3 Category 15 "Investments" total absolute emissions, Categories 1-14 and if applicable other upstream or downstream scope 3 emissions should be disclosed in 7.8.

columns.popup_helpKo: Date cannot be later than the date entered in 1.4 "State the end date 의 year for which you are reporting data."

guidance.text: This question only appears if you select "Yes" in column 1 "We measure the impact of our portfolio on the climate" and "Financed emissions" in column 2 "Disclosure metric" of 12.1.
guidance.textKo: This 문항 only appears 만약 you select "Yes" in 열 1 "We measure the impact of our 포트폴리오 on the climate" 및 "금융배출량" in 열 2 "공시 metric" of 12.1.

guidance.text:
General 
Metrics other than absolute emissions (in tCO2e) should not be reported in this question, and should be reported in 12.1.3. 
For example, weighted average carbon intensities (WACI) should be reported in 12.1.3. 
Portfolio (column 0) 
The options which appear are driven by the activities you selected in 1.10. 
You are requested to complete all rows in this table. 
Financed emissions (metric unit tons CO2e) in the reporting year (column 2) 
Use gross figures for reporting absolute emissions, not net figures. For funded amounts, gross exposure shall be calculated as the funded carrying amounts (before subtracting the loss allowance, when applicable), whether prepared in accordance with IFRS Accounting Standards or other GAAP. 
Enter the emissions in metric unit tons CO2e, entering numbers only up to 99,999,999,999 without commas and up to three decimal places. 
Negative numbers are not allowed as reporting needs to be gross, not net figures. Emission figures should be for the reporting year only. 
Entering 0 implies that you have measured and calculated emissions from this source and they are equal to zero. 
% of portfolio covered in relation to total portfolio value (column 3) 
Enter the percentage of portfolio value that has been covered by the financed emissions calculation to the portfolio value based on the assets value reported in 1.10. 
Total value of assets included in the financed emissions calculation (column 4) 
The value will be auto calculated based on the percentage provided in column 3 "% of portfolio covered in relation to total portfolio value" and the portfolio value based on assets value reported for the corresponding portfolio in question 1.10. 
% of financed emissions calculated using data obtained from clients/investees (optional) (column 5) 
Such data obtained from value chain partners (clients or investees) may take the form of primary activity data or emissions data calculated by value chain partners. More information on this can be found in Chapter 7, Collecting Data, of the GHG Protocol's Corporate Value Chain (Scope 3) Accounting and Reporting Standard. 
Weighted data quality score (for PCAF-aligned data quality scores only) (column 7) 
If you are using the Partnership for Carbon Accounting Financials (PCAF) quality score for your data, enter the relevant score (from 1 to 5). 
A score of 1 reflects the best quality data and means that the investee company has performed an emissions calculation that has been verified by a third-party auditor. A score of 5 is the lowest and estimates the emissions of the investee company based on sector and region averages or benchmarks. 
Financed emissions (metric unit tons CO2e) in the base year (column 8) 
The base year is the year against which you are comparing your financed emissions. 
The base year cannot be after the reporting year. 
Enter the emissions in metric unit tons CO2e, entering numbers only up to 99,999,999,999 without commas and up to three decimal places. 
Negative numbers are not allowed as reporting needs to be gross, not net figures. Emission figures should be for the reporting year only. 
Entering 0 implies that you have measured and calculated emissions from this source and they are equal to zero. 
Base year end (column 9) 
The base year is the year against which you are comparing your financed emissions. 
The base year cannot be after the reporting year. 
The start date of the base year will automatically be assumed to be exactly 365 days before the listed end date. For example, if you enter an end date of 31/12/2023, the start date of the base year will automatically be assumed to be 01/01/2023. 
% of undrawn loan commitments included in the financed emissions calculation (column 10) 
Disclose separately the percentage of undrawn loan commitments included in the financed emissions calculation. 
For portfolios that don't have any undrawn loan commitments enter 0 as a response. 
Please explain the details of and assumptions used in your calculation (column 11) 
Include the following information: 
The method of allocation the entity used to attribute its share of emissions in relation to the size of its gross exposure; 
The portfolios and/or asset classes that have been excluded from the calculation and the reasons for excluding them; 
If a portfolio or an asset class is not fully covered in the calculation, explain the exclusion and the reasons for not covering 100% of it; 
The scopes considered when measuring emissions associated with assets in your portfolio; 
The sources of data if primary data was used in calculating portfolio emissions; 
The approach taken to modelling or estimating emissions when primary data was not used; and 
Any assumptions used in the calculation. 
See the CDP Technical Note: Portfolio Impact Metrics for Financial Services Sector Companies for further information.

For example, weighted average carbon intensities (WACI) 해야 합니다 be 보고 in 12.1.3. 포트폴리오 (열 0) The options which appear are driven by the activities you 선택 in 1.10. You are requested to complete all 행 in this table. 금융배출량 (metric unit tons CO2e) in the 보고연도 (열 2) Use gross figures for reporting absolute emissions, not net figures. For funded amounts, gross exposure shall be calculated as the funded carrying amounts (before subtracting the loss allowance, 경우 해당되는 경우), whether prepared in accordance with IFRS Accounting 기준 또는 other GAAP. Enter the emissions in metric unit tons CO2e, entering numbers only up to 99,999,999,999 without commas 및 up to three decimal places. Negative numbers are not allowed as reporting needs to be gross, not net figures. Emission figures 해야 합니다 be 에 대한 보고연도 only. Entering 0 implies that you have measured 및 calculated emissions from this source 및 they are equal to zero. % of 포트폴리오 covered in relation to total 포트폴리오 value (열 3) Enter the percentage of 포트폴리오 value that has been covered by the 금융배출량 계산 to the 포트폴리오 value based on the 자산 value 보고 in 1.10. Total value of 자산 included in the 금융배출량 계산 (열 4) The value will be auto calculated based on the percentage 입력 in 열 3 "% of 포트폴리오 covered in relation to total 포트폴리오 value" 및 the 포트폴리오 value based on 자산 value 보고 에 대한 corresponding 포트폴리오 in 문항 1.10. % of 금융배출량 calculated using data obtained from 고객/투자대상 (optional) (열 5) Such data obtained from 가치사슬 partners (clients 또는 investees) may take the form of primary activity data 또는 배출량 데이터 calculated by 가치사슬 partners. More information on this can be found in Chapter 7, Collecting Data, 의 GHG Protocol's Corporate 가치사슬 (Scope 3) Accounting 및 Reporting Standard. Weighted data quality score (for PCAF-aligned data quality scores only) (열 7) 만약 you are using the Partnership for Carbon Accounting Financials (PCAF) quality score 귀사의 data, enter the 관련 score (from 1 to 5). A score of 1 reflects the best quality data 및 means that the investee company has performed an emissions 계산 that has been verified by a third-party auditor. A score of 5 is the lowest 및 estimates the emissions 의 investee company based on sector 및 region averages 또는 benchmarks. 금융배출량 (metric unit tons CO2e) in the 기준연도 (열 8) The 기준연도 is the year against which you are comparing your 금융배출량. The 기준연도 cannot be after the 보고연도. Enter the emissions in metric unit tons CO2e, entering numbers only up to 99,999,999,999 without commas 및 up to three decimal places. Negative numbers are not allowed as reporting needs to be gross, not net figures. Emission figures 해야 합니다 be 에 대한 보고연도 only. Entering 0 implies that you have measured 및 calculated emissions from this source 및 they are equal to zero. 기준연도 end (열 9) The 기준연도 is the year against which you are comparing your 금융배출량. The 기준연도 cannot be after the 보고연도. The start date 의 기준연도 will automatically be assumed to be exactly 365 days before the listed end date. For example, 만약 you enter an end date of 31/12/2023, the start date 의 기준연도 will automatically be assumed to be 01/01/2023. % of undrawn loan commitments included in the 금융배출량 계산 (열 10) Disclose separately the percentage of undrawn loan commitments included in the 금융배출량 계산. For 포트폴리오s that don't have 하나 이상 undrawn loan commitments enter 0 as a response. Please explain the details of 및 assumptions used in your 계산 (열 11) Include the following information: The method of allocation the entity used to attribute its share of emissions in relation to the size of its gross exposure; The 포트폴리오s 및/또는 asset classes that have been excluded from the 계산 및 the reasons for 제외 them; 만약 a 포트폴리오 또는 an asset class is not fully covered in the 계산, explain the exclusion 및 the reasons for not covering 100% of it; The scopes considered 경우 measuring emissions associated with 자산 in your 포트폴리오; The sources of data 만약 primary data was used in calculating 포트폴리오 emissions; The approach taken to modelling 또는 estimating emissions 경우 primary data was not used; 및 하나 이상 assumptions used in the 계산. See the CDP Technical Note: 포트폴리오 Impact Metrics for 금융 서비스 Sector Companies for further information.

guidance.text:
Financial institutions monitor and manage climate-related risks by measuring and disclosing the emissions associated with their financing, also known as "financed emissions".
Financial institutions disclose the methodology used to calculate the financed emissions, including the method of allocation the organization uses to attribute its share of emissions in relation to the value of its total assets as well as the total amount of assets/gross exposure included in the financed emissions disclosure and any exclusions from the calculation.
guidance.textKo: Financial institutions monitor 및 manage climate-related 리스크 by measuring 및 disclosing the emissions associated with their financing, also known as "금융배출량". Financial institutions disclose the 방법론 used to calculate the 금융배출량, 포함 the method of allocation the organization uses to attribute its share of emissions in relation to the value of its total 자산 as well as the total amount of 자산/gross exposure included in the 금융배출량 공시 및 제외사항 from the 계산.

guidance.text: Financed emissions: the absolute greenhouse gas emissions associated with a portfolio, expressed in tons CO2e. For financial institutions, the indirect emissions caused by their financing activities are relevant and their emissions inventory would be incomplete without accounting for them. The GHG Protocol classifies these emissions in Scope 3 Category 15 Investments. They are also known as portfolio emissions or financed emissions. Put simply, they are emissions that occur at sources owned or controlled by other organizations, but which are made possible because those organizations are financed by the lending and investment of financial institutions; and therefore are indirect to the financial institution and should be included in the financial institution's Scope 3 inventory.
guidance.textKo: 금융배출량: the absolute 온실가스 배출량 associated with a 포트폴리오, expressed in tons CO2e. For financial institutions, the indirect emissions caused by their financing activities are 관련 및 their emissions inventory would be incomplete without accounting 에 대한m. The GHG Protocol classifies these emissions in Scope 3 Category 15 Investments. They are also known as 포트폴리오 emissions 또는 금융배출량. Put simply, they are emissions that occur at sources owned 또는 controlled by other organizations, but which are made possible because those organizations are financed by the lending 및 investment of financial institutions; 및 therefore are indirect to the financial institution 및 해야 합니다 be included in the financial institution's Scope 3 inventory.

criteria.criteria:
ROUTE A)
'Yes' in column 'We measure the impact of our portfolio on the climate' AND 'Financed emissions' selected in column 'Disclosure metric' in any of the following rows in question 12.1:
- 'Banking (Bank)'
- 'Investing (Asset manager)'
- 'Investing (Asset owner)'
Points will be awarded per completed cell in proportion to the number of cells displayed (excluding column '% of financed emissions calculated using data obtained from clients/investees (optional)' AND row 'Insurance underwriting (Insurance company)').
A maximum of 4/4 points is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE B)
Any option excluding 'Yes' selected in column 'We measure the impact of our portfolio on the climate' OR Any option excluding 'Financed emissions' selected in column 'Disclosure metric' in all of the following rows in question 12.1
- 'Banking (Bank)'
- 'Investing (Asset manager)'
- 'Investing (Asset owner)'
AND
'Yes' selected in column 'We measure the impact of our portfolio on the climate' in row 'Insurance underwriting (Insurance company) in question 12.1 AND 'Financed emissions' selected in column 'Disclosure metric' in row 'Insurance underwriting (Insurance company) in question 12.1 - 0/0 points
A maximum of 0/0 points is available for this route.
criteria.criteriaKo: 경로 A) 'Yes' in 열 'We measure the impact of our 포트폴리오 on the climate' 그리고 '금융배출량' 선택 in 열 '공시 metric' in 하나 이상 의 following 행 in 문항 12.1: - 'Banking (Bank)' - 'Investing (Asset manager)' - 'Investing (Asset owner)' 점수가 부여됩니다 per 완성된 칸(셀) in proportion to the number of 표시된 칸(셀) (제외 열 '% of 금융배출량 calculated using data obtained from 고객/투자대상 (optional)' 그리고 행 'Insurance underwriting (Insurance company)'). 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 4/4점입니다. 또는 경로 B) 하나 이상 option 제외 'Yes' 선택 in 열 'We measure the impact of our 포트폴리오 on the climate' 또는 하나 이상 option 제외 '금융배출량' 선택 in 열 '공시 metric' in all 의 following 행 in 문항 12.1 - 'Banking (Bank)' - 'Investing (Asset manager)' - 'Investing (Asset owner)' 그리고 'Yes' 선택 in 열 'We measure the impact of our 포트폴리오 on the climate' in 행 'Insurance underwriting (Insurance company) in 문항 12.1 그리고 '금융배출량' 선택 in 열 '공시 metric' in 행 'Insurance underwriting (Insurance company) in 문항 12.1 - 0/0 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 0/0점입니다.

criteria.criteria:
ROUTE A)
Full Awareness points must be awarded to be eligible for Management points.
Figure greater than 10% provided in column '% of portfolio covered in relation to total portfolio value' AND column 'Financed emissions (metric unit tons CO2e) in the reporting year' completed in all rows (excluding row 'Insurance underwriting (Insurance company)') - 2 points
A maximum of 2/2 points is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE B)
Any option excluding 'Yes' selected in column 'We measure the impact of our portfolio on the climate' OR Any option excluding 'Financed emissions' selected in column 'Disclosure metric' in all of the following rows in question 12.1
- 'Banking (Bank)'
- 'Investing (Asset manager)'
- 'Investing (Asset owner)'
AND
'Yes' selected in column 'We measure the impact of our portfolio on the climate' in row 'Insurance underwriting (Insurance company) in question 12.1 AND 'Financed emissions' selected in column 'Disclosure metric' in row 'Insurance underwriting (Insurance company) in question 12.1 - 0/0 points
A maximum of 0/0 points is available for this route.

simpleHelpKo: GHG 배출량 회계 is one 의 primary metrics organizations in the financial sector can use to understand how their 포트폴리오 impacts the climate. In addition to highlighting 리스크 및 기회, 포트폴리오 emissions 공시 is a pre-requisite for financial institutions to measure improvements in the climate performance 의ir 포트폴리오s, 및 measure progress towards the net zero commitments that are increasingly being made. IMP또는TANT NOTE: This 문항 asks you to disclose your 금융배출량 (also known as Scope 3 Category 15 "Investments" total absolute emissions).
